title: Glassbox refactor and fixes
summary:
Spent all day cleaning up the Glassbox code. My evolution logic had many small bugs. The device mismatch in progressive_round_loss was causing random crashes. I also fixed the LBFGS closure issue because it was not updating variables correctly.

I removed some unnecessary gc.collect calls to make things faster. Also changed all my print statements to use the logging module. It is much easier to debug now. I updated the coefficient extraction in phased_regression.py and added harder tests with PI in test_visualization.py to make sure the math is correct.
commitMessages: refactor(evolution): major code quality improvements and bug fixes
